task_completion.visual_evidence: The Accounts module is visible, indicated by 'Accounts' being highlighted in the top navigation bar or the page title showing Accounts.

task_completion.description: Open the search or filter panel in the Accounts module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Advanced Search or Filter panel is expanded and visible on the Accounts list view page.

task_completion.description: Enter 'TX' in the Billing State filter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'TX' is typed into the 'Billing State' input field within the search/filter panel.
'Technology' is selected or highlighted in the 'Industry' dropdown menu within the search/filter panel.

task_completion.description: Save the search with the name 'Texas Tech Customers'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Texas Tech Customers' is typed into the 'Save search as' or 'Saved Search Name' input field, or is visible in the 'My Saved Searches' dropdown.
The list view updates to show account records matching the criteria, and the saved search 'Texas Tech Customers' is shown as the currently active filter.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to create the search
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web interface in a browser, rather than terminal windows executing SQL queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: Results are displayed in the genuine CRM interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The filtered accounts are shown in the standard SuiteCRM list view table, not in a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console being open to manipulate the DOM and fake the saved search name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target saved search must be named exactly 'Texas Tech Customers'. It must be created in the 'Accounts' module. The search criteria must include Billing State set to 'TX' and Industry set to 'Technology'.
